property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\WindowsPowerShell\Scripts;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-22\bin;C:\Users\seema_keshri\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;%SystemRoot%\system32;%SystemRoot%;%SystemRoot%\System32\Wbem;%SYSTEMROOT%\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;%SYSTEMROOT%\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\HP\HP One Agent;C:\Users\seema_keshri\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2024.1.4\bin;;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.1.4\bin;;C:\Users\seema_keshri\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\edgedriver_win64;;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Playwright Auto Wait Functionality", "IPL Points Table Validation"](1)

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify IPL Table Data", "IPL Points Table Validation"](2)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Verify IPL Table Data &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/IPLPointTableValidation.feature:11&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser launches the IPL table page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_am_on_the_ipl_points_table_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser scrolls to the bottom of the page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_search_for_team()&amp#27;[0m [] [ 1 , , GT , 12, 8, 4, 0, 0.551, 2111/230.4, 2047/238.0, 16, WWWWW ] [ 2 , , RCB , 11, 7, 4, 0, 1.103, 2026/195.1, 1973/212.4, 14, WLLWW ] [ 3 , , SRH , 12, 7, 5, 0, 0.331, 2418/237.1, 2295/232.4, 14, LWLWW ] [ 4 , , PBKS , 11, 6, 4, 1, 0.428, 2112/192.0, 2095/198.1, 13, LLLLW ] [ 5 , , CSK , 11, 6, 5, 0, 0.185, 2023/215.0, 1914/207.3, 12, WWWLW ] [ 6 , , RR , 11, 6, 5, 0, 0.082, 1996/200.3, 2057/208.2, 12, LLWLW ] [ 7 , , DC , 12, 5, 7, 0, -0.993, 2159/233.2, 2225/217.1, 10, WLLWL ] [ 8 , , KKR , 10, 4, 5, 1, -0.169, 1534/172.2, 1622/178.5, 9, WWWWL ] [ 9 , , MI , 11, 3, 8, 0, -0.585, 2026/208.5, 2083/202.3, 6, LWLLL ] [ 10 , , LSG , 11, 3, 8, 0, -0.907, 1910/218.5, 2004/208.0, 6, LWLLL ] [Batsman, Indian,
] [, ] [] [] [A 22-year old opening batsman who hails from Pune, Ruturaj Gaikwad has been a consistent performer for his state team Maharashtra. He was the highest run-getter for Maharashtra in the league stage of the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2018-19. At the IPL 2019 Player Auction, the Chennai Super Kings secured his services at his base price of INR 20 lacs., ] &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser prints the IPL points table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_prints_the_ipl_points_table()&amp#27;[0m Total Teams: 16 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTotal IPL teams should be greater than 0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.total_ipl_teams_should_be_greater_than_0()&amp#27;[0m Top Team Points: 2047/238.0 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTop IPL team points should be displayed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.top_ipl_team_points_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[0m Is Team Present: true &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTeam &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MI"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be present in the table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.team_should_be_present_in_the_table(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m GT RCB SRH PBKS CSK RR DC KKR MI LSG &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser prints all IPL team names&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_prints_all_ipl_team_names()&amp#27;[0m Screenshot captured successfully &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser captures screenshot with name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ipl-points-table"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_captures_screenshot_with_name(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
